nearby_places.description: Mountain on Hong Kong island (elevation 1,181 feet) known for its skyline & waterfront views.
Bustling harbour area with waterfront scenery & popular nighttime light & firework displays.
Everything from trinkets, jade & antiques to electronics & watches sold in a bustling night market.
Promenade with handprints & plaques honoring Hong Kong film stars, plus a Bruce Lee statue.
Theme park with rollercoasters & water rides, a cable car & a marine park with animal enclosures.
Victorian-era train taking visitors to the highest peak on Hong Kong island for views of the city.
Large museum showcasing the history & culture of Hong Kong from prehistoric to modern times.
Historic district of narrow streets & alleys lined with restaurants, nightclubs & bars.
Hong Kong's main art museum, featuring mostly Chinese paintings, sculptures & drawings.
Famous theme park complex featuring 7 areas with rides, shows and welcoming costumed characters.
1800s temple featuring a lavish, traditional interior with dozens of incense spirals overhead.
Waterside egg-shaped building with planetarium and Omnimax films, plus space and astronomy exhibits.

nearby_places.place_name: Sik Sik Yuen Wong Tai Sin Temple
nearby_places.description: Built with feng shui elements, this Taoist shrine to Wong Tai Sin is considered a source of luck.
Indoor observation deck on the 100th floor with high-tech telescopes, interactive exhibits & a cafe.

recent_review.review_text: Location is excellent. The room is quiet and good maintained. I like little details in room eg. Adapter plug, Diptyque brand amenities.
